title: Mega Magic Modpack
description: A large Minecraft modpack that features many of the biggest magic mods.
body:
![modpack banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9027dae18261b596040525435c7c42c436d7d856.jpeg)

The Mega Magic Modpack brings together the most enchanting mods for an unforgettable magical adventure. Featuring over 55 carefully selected mods—including blockbusters like Hex Casting, Iron’s Spells ’n Spellbooks, and Mana and Artifice—plus four vibrant resource packs, this modpack transforms your world into a mystical realm of wonder.

# Highlights

## Food and cooking mods
###  Pizza Craft
An epic and dynamic pizza making mod.
###  Sushi go Crafting
A totally amazing and also dynamic sushi crafting mod.
###  Gelato Galore 2
The coolest ice cream mod around.
## Exploration improving mods
### Additional Structures
Adds over 100 new structures to the overworld.
### Platanitos
Adds many neat things to the game like bags.
### Map Atlases
A very vanilla-friendly map mod.
## Main magic mods
### Hex Casting
A really cool mod that adds stack-based programmable spellcasting.
### Iron’s Spells ’n Spellbooks
The classic RPG like magic mod.
### Nature's Aura
A strange aura based mod where you build lots of multiblock structures.
### Mana and Artifice
An extremely large and complicated mod about crafting and casting spells.
